name: Google Forms
description: Create Google Forms, update form metadata and items with batch updates, and read form responses through the connected Google account.

toolDeclarations.name: create_google_form
toolDeclarations.description: Create a new Google Form. Use this to start a form or quiz before adding items with batch updates.

unpublished.description: Whether the form should start unpublished.

toolDeclarations.name: get_google_form
toolDeclarations.description: Read Google Form metadata and basic structure by form id or URL.

toolDeclarations.name: batch_update_google_form
toolDeclarations.description: Apply one or more Google Forms batchUpdate requests. Use this to update form info, settings, items, or answer keys.

items.description: A single Google Forms batchUpdate request object.

includeFormInResponse.description: Whether to include the updated form in the response.

toolDeclarations.name: add_google_form_questions
toolDeclarations.description: Add one or more generated questions to a Google Form. Use this instead of raw batchUpdate JSON when the user asks for generated questions.

questions.description: Question specs to add to the form in order.

scaleLow.description: Lowest value for a scale question.

scaleHigh.description: Highest value for a scale question.

lowLabel.description: Label for the low end of the scale.

highLabel.description: Label for the high end of the scale.

includeTime.description: Whether date questions should include time.

includeYear.description: Whether date questions should include year.

toolDeclarations.name: list_google_form_responses
toolDeclarations.description: List responses submitted to a Google Form.

filter.description: Optional response filter, such as timestamp > 1710000000000.
